title: ClusterEdgeOptions
content:
# ClusterEdgeOptions


## Properties

- **image_pull_policy** (`string`): Image pull policy to be used when deploying workloads. Options are `Always`, and `IfNotPresent`. Default: `IfNotPresent`

image_pull_policy.description: Image pull policy to be used when deploying workloads. Options are `Always`, and `IfNotPresent`. Default: `IfNotPresent`
